title: EQ - Change propagation, use two mobile phones
scenario: EQ settings (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom) made on one phone are not propagated to the second phone when both are connected to the same Poly device via Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Phone 1 and connect to the Poly Bluetooth audio device.
Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
Select an EQ preset (e.g., Bass, Flat, Bright) or create a Custom EQ setting.
Verify the EQ change is applied and audible on Phone 1.
Without disconnecting Phone 1, open Poly Studio Mobile app on Phone 2 and connect to the same Poly device.
Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer on Phone 2.
Observe the EQ settings displayed on Phone 2.
expected: The EQ preset or custom settings made on Phone 1 are reflected and displayed on Phone 2's Equalizer screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
